ucs.title: [LLM] Lazarus 'Operation DreamJob' / 3CX-style trojanized signed binary side-loading a malicious DLL from a user-writable path
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Lazarus initial-access chain (Diamond Sleet / Labyrinth Chollima): a job-themed ISO/ZIP drops a renamed copy of a legitimate signed application (SumatraPDF, CiscoCollabHost, FoxitReader, X_TRADER, 3CXDesktopApp, etc.) into Public/Temp/Downloads/ProgramData; that binary loads an adversary-supplied side-load DLL (LightlessCan, MagicRAT, BLINDINGCAN, AppleJeus loaders) from the same directory. The pairing of a Lazarus-trojanized application name + adjacent side-load DLL + user-writable path is what separates this from generic side-loading.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("SumatraPDF.exe","CiscoCollabHost.exe","colorui.exe","PCKeeper.exe","FoxitReader.exe","X_TRADER.exe","3CXDesktopApp.exe","ZoomLauncher.exe","WSearch.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe") (Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\ProgramData\\*") NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","NETWORK SERVICE","LOCAL SERVICE")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_path Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_path as launcher_path, process_hash as launcher_hash | join type=inner dest launcher_path [ search (sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=7) (ImageLoaded="*\\msvcr100.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\libcef.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\colorui.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\wsock32.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\VERSION.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\msvcp140.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\HID.DLL" OR ImageLoaded="*\\ssleay32.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\libeay32.dll" OR ImageLoaded="*\\wlbsctrl.dll") | rex field=Image "(?<launcher_path>.*\\\\)" | rename Computer as dest | fields dest launcher_path ImageLoaded ImageLoadedHash Signed ] | where Signed!="true" OR isnull(Signed) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` | table firstTime lastTime dest user process_name launcher_path launcher_hash parent_process_name ImageLoaded ImageLoadedHash
ucs.kql:
let _LazarusTrojanizedBins = dynamic(["SumatraPDF.exe","CiscoCollabHost.exe","colorui.exe","PCKeeper.exe","FoxitReader.exe","X_TRADER.exe","3CXDesktopApp.exe","ZoomLauncher.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe","WSearch.exe"]);
let _LazarusSideLoadedDlls = dynamic(["msvcr100.dll","libcef.dll","colorui.dll","HID.DLL","ssleay32.dll","libeay32.dll","wlbsctrl.dll","VERSION.dll","wsock32.dll","winmm.dll","msvcp140.dll","secur32.dll","DSROLE.dll"]);
let _userPaths = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Roaming\"]);
let Loaders = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_LazarusTrojanizedBins)
    | where FolderPath has_any (_userPaths)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              LoaderProcessId = ProcessId,
              LoaderName = FileName, LoaderPath = FolderPath,
              LoaderCmd = ProcessCommandLine, LoaderSHA256 = SHA256,
              LoaderCompany = ProcessVersionInfoCompanyName,
              ParentName = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where FileName in~ (_LazarusSideLoadedDlls)
| where FolderPath has_any (_userPaths)
| join kind=inner Loaders on DeviceId, $left.InitiatingProcessId == $right.LoaderProcessId
| where FolderPath =~ LoaderPath                           // DLL adjacent to loader
| where SHA256 != LoaderSHA256                              // not the loader itself
| where isempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)    // unsigned / blank company
     or InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !~ LoaderCompany   // company mismatch
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ParentName, ParentCmd,
          LoaderName, LoaderPath, LoaderCmd, LoaderSHA256, LoaderCompany,
          SideLoadedDll = FileName, DllPath = FolderPath, DllSHA256 = SHA256,
          DllCompany = InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _LazarusTrojanizedBins = dynamic(["SumatraPDF.exe","CiscoCollabHost.exe","colorui.exe","PCKeeper.exe","FoxitReader.exe","X_TRADER.exe","3CXDesktopApp.exe","ZoomLauncher.exe","GoogleUpdate.exe","WSearch.exe"]);
let _LazarusSideLoadedDlls = dynamic(["msvcr100.dll","libcef.dll","colorui.dll","HID.DLL","ssleay32.dll","libeay32.dll","wlbsctrl.dll","VERSION.dll","wsock32.dll","winmm.dll","msvcp140.dll","secur32.dll"]);
let _userPaths = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\AppData\Roaming\"]);
let Loaders = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ProcFile = tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1])
    | where ProcFile in~ (_LazarusTrojanizedBins)
    | where NewProcessName has_any (_userPaths)
    | project LoaderTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              LoaderProcId = NewProcessId, LoaderImage = NewProcessName,
              LoaderCmd = CommandLine;
let Sysmon7 = WindowsEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where Provider == "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" and EventID == 7
    | extend Image = tostring(EventData.Image),
             ImageLoaded = tostring(EventData.ImageLoaded),
             Signed = tostring(EventData.Signed),
             Signature = tostring(EventData.Signature),
             ProcessId = tostring(EventData.ProcessId),
             Hashes = tostring(EventData.Hashes)
    | extend DllFile = tostring(split(ImageLoaded, @"\")[-1])
    | where DllFile in~ (_LazarusSideLoadedDlls)
    | where ImageLoaded has_any (_userPaths);
Sysmon7
| join kind=inner Loaders on $left.Computer == $right.Computer, $left.Image == $right.LoaderImage
| where Signed =~ "false" or Signature has_any ("Invalid","Unavailable","-")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, LoaderImage, LoaderCmd,
          ImageLoaded, Signed, Signature, Hashes
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: This is the textbook Lazarus tradecraft documented across Operation DreamJob (Mandiant), Operation Interception (ESET), the 3CX supply-chain attack (Microsoft DEV-0139/Diamond Sleet), the X_TRADER compromise, and AppleJeus/MagicRAT/LightlessCan campaigns. Lazarus consistently pairs a renamed-but-still-validly-signed legitimate application with a malicious side-load DLL named after a real Windows/C

ucs.title: [LLM] Lazarus rundll32/regsvr32 named-export persistence pointed at a DLL in %ProgramData% / %Public% via scheduled task or service
ucs.description: Hunts the post-install persistence stage that Diamond Sleet / Labyrinth Chollima uses across BLINDINGCAN, MagicRAT, COPPERHEDGE and the 3CX second-stage implant: after the side-loaded loader writes a payload DLL into ProgramData/Public/AppData, persistence is established as a scheduled task or auto-start service that invokes `rundll32.exe <path>,<NamedExport>` (commonly export ordinals or names like `Init`, `RtlInit`, `_StartW`). The rundll32 grandparent-chain (services.exe / svchost.exe / taskeng.exe) plus a non-system DLL path is the high-fidelity pivot.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmdline values(Processes.process_hash) as process_hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") (Processes.process="*\\Users\\Public\\*.dll*" OR Processes.process="*\\ProgramData\\*.dll*" OR Processes.process="*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*.dll*" OR Processes.process="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*.dll*") Processes.parent_process_name IN ("svchost.exe","taskeng.exe","schtasks.exe","services.exe","wmiprvse.exe") NOT Processes.user IN ("*$") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=cmdline "(?i)\"?(?<dll_path>[a-z]:\\\\[^\",]+\.dll)\"?[\s,]+(?<export>[A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})" | where isnotnull(export) AND NOT match(dll_path, "(?i)\\\\Windows\\\\|\\\\Program Files") | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(cmdline) as cmdline values(dll_path) as dll_path values(export) as export values(parent_cmdline) as parent_cmdline values(process_hash) as process_hash by dest user process_name parent_process_name | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("svchost.exe","taskeng.exe","schtasks.exe","services.exe","wmiprvse.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @'(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:Users\\Public|ProgramData|Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(?:Roaming|Local\\Temp))\\[^\s,"]+\.dll)[\s",]+([A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})'
| extend DllPath  = extract(@'(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:Users\\Public|ProgramData|Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(?:Roaming|Local\\Temp))\\[^\s,"]+\.dll)', 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend Export   = extract(@'(?i)\.dll[\s",]+([A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})', 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| where isnotempty(DllPath) and isnotempty(Export)
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified")
    | where FileName endswith ".dll"
    | project DllSHA256 = SHA256, DllFolderPath = FolderPath, DllFileName = FileName,
              DllCreatorAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              DllCreatorName = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DllCreateTime = Timestamp, DeviceId
  ) on DeviceId
| where DllPath has DllFileName and DllPath has DllFolderPath
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          GrandParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          RundllCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DllPath, Export, DllSHA256, DllCreatorName, DllCreatorAccount, DllCreateTime
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Image  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\")[-1])),
         Parent = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, @"\")[-1]))
| where Image in ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
| where Parent in ("svchost.exe","taskeng.exe","schtasks.exe","services.exe","wmiprvse.exe")
| where CommandLine matches regex @'(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:Users\\Public|ProgramData|Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(?:Roaming|Local\\Temp))\\[^\s,"]+\.dll)[\s",]+([A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})'
| extend DllPath = extract(@'(?i)([a-z]:\\(?:Users\\Public|ProgramData|Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(?:Roaming|Local\\Temp))\\[^\s,"]+\.dll)', 1, CommandLine),
         Export  = extract(@'(?i)\.dll[\s",]+([A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})', 1, CommandLine)
| where isnotempty(DllPath) and isnotempty(Export)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName,
          CommandLine, DllPath, Export
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Lazarus rundll32/regsvr32 Named-Export Persistence from User-Writable Path
id: 9b2e2a7e-3f4a-4f6c-9c4d-d9c7c0a6f1a4
status: experimental
description: Detects rundll32.exe or regsvr32.exe spawned by a service/scheduler parent and pointed at a DLL with an explicit named export located in ProgramData/Public/AppData. Matches the Diamond Sleet / Labyrinth Chollima (Lazarus) post-install persistence pattern observed across BLINDINGCAN, MagicRAT, COPPERHEDGE and 3CX second-stage implants.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2023/04/20/3cx-supply-chain-attack/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0032/
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026-05-05
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1053.005
  - attack.t1218.011
  - attack.g0032
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_image:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\svchost.exe'
      - '\taskeng.exe'
      - '\schtasks.exe'
      - '\services.exe'
      - '\wmiprvse.exe'
  selection_path:
    CommandLine|re|i: '([a-z]:\\(?:Users\\Public|ProgramData|Users\\[^\\]+\\AppData\\(?:Roaming|Local\\Temp))\\[^\s,"]+\.dll)[\s",]+([A-Za-z_#@][\w#@]{0,40})'
  filter_user:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_image and selection_parent and selection_path and not filter_user
fields:
  - Image
  - ParentImage
  - CommandLine
  - User
  - Computer
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate enterprise software persisting via scheduled task pointing at ProgramData (rare; profile per-org)
  - Microsoft Office click-to-run repair tasks invoking rundll32 against Office paths
level: high
ucs.rationale: Lazarus's mid-stage tooling (BLINDINGCAN, MagicRAT, COPPERHEDGE, 3CX second-stage `iconic.dll`) is consistently invoked via rundll32/regsvr32 with an explicit export name against a payload DLL written to ProgramData or Public — Mandiant, Microsoft (Diamond Sleet) and Cisco Talos all document this exact pattern. The combination of (a) service/scheduler grandparent, (b) DLL path in user-writable spa
